title: Consortium Partners — DIGI-METER
description: Meet the 11 European partners behind DIGI-METER — an Erasmus+ consortium spanning Cyprus, Greece, Portugal, Italy, Germany, France, Belgium, and the Netherlands.

strings.source: DIGI-METER brings together researchers, educators, technologists, ethicists, and communicators from across Europe — united by a shared commitment to evidence-based digital competence assessment.
strings.value: DIGI-METER brings together researchers, educators, technologists, ethicists, and communicators from across Europe — united by a shared commitment to evidence-based digital competence assessment.

strings.source: Cyprus, Greece, Portugal, Italy, Germany, France, Belgium, Netherlands
strings.value: Cyprus, Greece, Portugal, Italy, Germany, France, Belgium, Netherlands

strings.source: DigComp 2.2 — the EU digital competence reference
strings.value: DigComp 2.2 — the EU digital competence reference

strings.source: Each partner contributes a distinct area of expertise. Together we cover the full cycle from framework design through technical development, piloting, policy transfer, and communication.
strings.value: Each partner contributes a distinct area of expertise. Together we cover the full cycle from framework design through technical development, piloting, policy transfer, and communication.

strings.source: Center for Social Innovation (CSI) is a research and development organisation based in Cyprus, focused on fostering positive social change through innovation, education, technology, and collaboration. CSI works across local, European, and international projects, developing solutions that address societal challenges in areas such as digital transformation, education and training, social inclusion, entrepreneurship, sustainability, and youth empowerment. Through research-driven methodologies and strong stakeholder engagement, CSI designs and implements innovative tools, training programmes, policy recommendations, and awareness initiatives that strengthen communities and support lifelong learning. The organisation actively participates in Erasmus+, Horizon Europe, and other EU-funded programmes, collaborating with universities, public authorities, NGOs, and private-sector partners to promote social impact, digital resilience, and inclusive growth. CSI's mission is to bridge innovation and society by creating practical, sustainable, and human-centred solutions.
strings.value: Center for Social Innovation (CSI) is a research and development organisation based in Cyprus, focused on fostering positive social change through innovation, education, technology, and collaboration. strings.source: — Project coordination, quality assurance, reporting, sustainability support, and overall consortium coordination.
strings.value: — Project coordination, quality assurance, reporting, sustainability support, and overall consortium coordination.

strings.source: SciCo (Science Communication) is a non-profit organisation focused on scientific engagement and empowerment through innovative, interactive, and entertaining means. Founded in 2008, it brings together scientists, academics, educators, artists, and science enthusiasts, and today operates as a social enterprise.
strings.value: SciCo (Science Communication) is a non-profit organisation focused on scientific engagement and empowerment through innovative, interactive, and entertaining means. Founded in 2008, it brings together scientists, academics, educators, artists, and science enthusiasts, and today operates as a social enterprise.

strings.source: Through high-impact outreach activities — including science festivals, digital platforms, and workshops — SciCo has reached more than 400,000 people across Greece. The organisation has also expanded internationally through its own projects and participation in EU programmes and networks.
strings.value: Through high-impact outreach activities — including science festivals, digital platforms, and workshops — SciCo has reached more than 400,000 people across Greece. The organisation has also expanded internationally through its own projects and participation in EU programmes and networks.

strings.source: — Framework mapping, DigComp 2.2 indicator development, educational methodology, and teacher engagement.
strings.value: — Framework mapping, DigComp 2.2 indicator development, educational methodology, and teacher engagement.

strings.source: UBITECH is a leading, innovative, and research-driven software house, systems integrator, and technology provider, established in Athens, Greece, in 2005. The company delivers advanced technical solutions and consulting services to businesses, organisations, and public authorities, enabling secure access to diverse information resources and services. With strong expertise in Deep Tech, Artificial Intelligence, data analytics, cybersecurity, cloud computing, and digital transformation, UBITECH develops cutting-edge solutions that address complex technological and societal challenges. The company actively participates in European and international research and innovation initiatives, combining strong research capabilities with market-oriented innovation. UBITECH has also expanded internationally through affiliated companies and subsidiaries in Limassol, Cyprus, and Buenos Aires, Argentina.
strings.value: UBITECH is a leading, innovative, and research-driven software house, systems integrator, and technology provider, established in Athens, Greece, in 2005. UBITECH has also expanded internationally through affiliated companies and subsidiaries in Limassol, Cyprus, and Buenos Aires, Argentina.

strings.source: — Technical development of the platform, adaptive assessment engine, APIs, dashboard, and secure cloud integration.
strings.value: — Technical development of the platform, adaptive assessment engine, APIs, dashboard, and secure cloud integration.

strings.source: Approximar brings strong experience in vocational education, social innovation, and stakeholder engagement. In DIGI-METER, the organisation supports pilot preparation, implementation, user feedback collection, and validation activities in real educational and VET settings. Its contribution helps ensure that the project tools are practical, inclusive, and relevant for institutions and learners.

In DIGI-METER, the organisation supports pilot preparation, implementation, user feedback collection, and validation activities in real educational and VET settings. Its contribution helps ensure that the project tools are practical, inclusive, and relevant for institutions and learners.

strings.source: — Piloting, VET engagement, validation activities, user feedback, and evidence from learning contexts.
strings.value: — Piloting, VET engagement, validation activities, user feedback, and evidence from learning contexts.

strings.source: Lascò specialises in digital transformation, innovation design, and digital skills development, with activities spanning educational technology, educational research, and the design of digital skilling actions for diverse target groups — including public authorities, education providers, large enterprises, and SMEs at national and international level.
strings.value: Lascò specialises in digital transformation, innovation design, and digital skills development, with activities spanning educational technology, educational research, and the design of digital skilling actions for diverse target groups — including public authorities, education providers, large enterprises, and SMEs at national and international level.

strings.source: The company brings expertise in education science, digital upskilling and reskilling, and technology-enhanced learning, addressing diverse learner profiles across multiple sectors. Within European-funded projects, Lascò has contributed to the development of skills frameworks, curricula, training methodologies, and innovative learning solutions — including practices recognised by the UN Global Compact – Spanish Network for their contribution to the SDGs. Lascò also served as one of 20 Core Members in Europe of the Digital Working Group of the European Commission's Harnessing Talent Platform (DG REGIO), leading an expert group on regional education and training systems for the twin transition.
strings.value: The company brings expertise in education science, digital upskilling and reskilling, and technology-enhanced learning, addressing diverse learner profiles across multiple sectors. strings.source: — Scaling project outcomes into national and EU education policy frameworks.
strings.value: — Scaling project outcomes into national and EU education policy frameworks.

strings.source: Outside Media & Knowledge is a German creative and knowledge-transfer agency specialising in digital communication for European-funded projects. As co-leaders of WP5 Communication, Dissemination & Exploitation, Outside Media & Knowledge is responsible for project branding, website development and operation, visual identity, social media, press relations, and the full dissemination and exploitation strategy. This website is designed, hosted, and maintained by Outside Media & Knowledge.

strings.source: Syncnify is a Paris-based social innovation and consulting agency that helps organisations transform sustainability, inclusivity, and innovation into concrete strategies and measurable action. It works with businesses, public institutions, research organisations, and civil society actors to design tailored solutions that respond to today's social, environmental, and economic challenges. With a strong European outlook, Syncnify supports partnership development, capacity-building activities, strategic communication, and change-oriented advisory services. Syncnify is a member of the Pact for Skills and the European Digital SMEs Alliance, reflecting its commitment to skills development, digital transformation, and cross-sector collaboration at European level.

With a strong European outlook, Syncnify supports partnership development, capacity-building activities, strategic communication, and change-oriented advisory services. Syncnify is a member of the Pact for Skills and the European Digital SMEs Alliance, reflecting its commitment to skills development, digital transformation, and cross-sector collaboration at European level.

strings.source: — Analytics, dashboard interfaces, front-end support, user experience, and data visualisation.

strings.source: CEC (Chrysako Educational Centre Limited) operates the College of Tourism and Hotel Management (COTHM), a private higher education institution in Cyprus specialising in tourism, hospitality, business, management, and vocational education and training. The institution offers certificate, diploma, bachelor's, and master's programmes combining academic excellence with industry-oriented practical training.
strings.value: CEC (Chrysako Educational Centre Limited) operates the College of Tourism and Hotel Management (COTHM), a private higher education institution in Cyprus specialising in tourism, hospitality, business, management, and vocational education and training. The institution offers certificate, diploma, bachelor's, and master's programmes combining academic excellence with industry-oriented practical training.

strings.source: COTHM promotes innovation, sustainability, employability, and digital transformation through higher education, VET, curriculum development, work-based learning, and industry collaboration. The college also participates in research and European projects focusing on tourism sustainability, circular economy, digital education, immersive technologies, serious games, and gamification. Through Erasmus+ collaborations, COTHM supports internationalisation and the development of innovative learning approaches for the tourism and hospitality sectors.
strings.value: COTHM promotes innovation, sustainability, employability, and digital transformation through higher education, VET, curriculum development, work-based learning, and industry collaboration. The college also participates in research and European projects focusing on tourism sustainability, circular economy, digital education, immersive technologies, serious games, and gamification. Through Erasmus+ collaborations, COTHM supports internationalisation and the development of innovative learning approaches for the tourism and hospitality sectors.

strings.source: — VET sector input, stakeholder engagement, dissemination activities, event support, and WP5 communication coordination.

strings.source: AB Corporation is a consultancy specialised in guiding organisations through the full journey of EU proposal writing and project management. With a mission to transform innovative ideas into funded, high-impact projects, the company supports clients from early concept development to successful submission and implementation. Its expertise spans proposal writing, funding scheme selection, project management, and strategic partnership building, ensuring each initiative is aligned with the most relevant and competitive EU opportunities. Combining deep knowledge of the EU landscape with a personalised, success-driven approach, AB Corporation helps clients secure funding, manage complex projects, and turn ambitious visions into tangible results.

strings.source: — EU policy liaison, credential and standardisation expertise, DigComp/EDSC alignment, and policy engagement.
strings.value: — EU policy liaison, credential and standardisation expertise, DigComp/EDSC alignment, and policy engagement.

strings.source: Ergonact Ltd is a Cyprus-based consultancy operating at the intersection of AI transformation, data governance, and EU-funded research and innovation. The company helps SMEs, public sector organisations, and research consortia move from strategy to execution — combining hands-on advisory with structured assessment methodologies.
strings.value: Ergonact Ltd is a Cyprus-based consultancy operating at the intersection of AI transformation, data governance, and EU-funded research and innovation. The company helps SMEs, public sector organisations, and research consortia move from strategy to execution — combining hands-on advisory with structured assessment methodologies.

strings.source: Ergonact's consulting portfolio spans data and AI readiness assessments, cybersecurity readiness, automation evaluations, and AI adoption advisory. The team leads ethics and data governance workstreams across multi-partner European projects, ensuring compliance with the EU AI Act, GDPR, and sector-specific regulatory frameworks. As an active partner in Horizon Europe, Erasmus+, and Digital Europe Programme consortia, Ergonact contributes technical, ethical, and operational expertise to collaborative innovation initiatives.

strings.source: — Ethics, accessibility, AI compliance, GDPR support, bias audits, and responsible technology guidance.
strings.value: — Ethics, accessibility, AI compliance, GDPR support, bias audits, and responsible technology guidance.

strings.source: Crow Group contributes experience in applied research, sustainable development, public-sector innovation, and stakeholder engagement. In DIGI-METER, it supports policy alignment, exploitation planning, and outreach to relevant networks. Its contribution helps strengthen the long-term relevance and practical uptake of the project results.

strings.source: Our consortium spans educational research, AI engineering, policy consulting, ethics, VET training, creative communication, and stakeholder relations. This intentional diversity ensures DIGI-METER is technically rigorous, ethically sound, pedagogically grounded, and practically applicable across different national education systems.
strings.value: Our consortium spans educational research, AI engineering, policy consulting, ethics, VET training, creative communication, and stakeholder relations. This intentional diversity ensures DIGI-METER is technically rigorous, ethically sound, pedagogically grounded, and practically applicable across different national education systems.

strings.source: The geographic spread — from Cyprus to the Netherlands, from Portugal to Belgium — also means our tools are tested and validated in genuinely different cultural and institutional contexts, making them transferable across the EU and beyond.
strings.value: The geographic spread — from Cyprus to the Netherlands, from Portugal to Belgium — also means our tools are tested and validated in genuinely different cultural and institutional contexts, making them transferable across the EU and beyond.

strings.source: Measuring Digital Competence for Resilient Learning Ecosystems. An Erasmus+ Forward-Looking project translating DigComp 2.2 into actionable, trustworthy educational testing.
